title: More Armors and Srtuctures
description: This mod adds a lot of new armor type some are better than netherite like titanium armor.It also adds some large structures.
body: If you download this mod and genarate a new world there will be so many structures and armors.Some armors are better than netherite like neon armor.there are 3 nether portal structures 1 portal comes lit and the other 2 comes unlit.The features of this mod are so good it is really good to have so many structures and armors.This is the first version so it doesn't have many structures or armors.I will add more armors later on.There is also a infinite armor set and tools to use this mod you just have toput the jar file in the mods derectory and open an world.
